page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7se.8xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at 2.9 GHz. It features 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs, indicating a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier for most compute and memory tasks, with a Passmark CPU score of 36,838.07 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 13,470.0. Its memory subsystem demonstrates strong relative performance, scoring 2,789.6 in the Passmark memory test, which places it in the top 25% tier. This is supported by a read-only small-block memory bandwidth of 1,717.85 GB/sec. For specialized workloads, it achieves 31.36 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks and shows strong text generation speeds of 316.66 tokens per second for small 135M LLM models.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.c7se.8xlarge offers a high density of dedicated Intel Xeon compute cores relative to its memory footprint. However, because it lacks bundled local storage, users must factor in the additional cost and latency of network-attached storage volumes. The 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it highly efficient for CPU-bound tasks but less suitable for memory-intensive databases or large-scale data caching that require higher RAM-to-core ratios.

This instance is well-suited for compute-intensive workloads such as software compilation, web serving, and moderate-scale machine learning inference. Its strong multi-threaded decompression performance of 161.37 GB/sec in bzip3 and solid cryptography capabilities supported by AVX-512 and VAES instruction sets make it appropriate for batch processing, CI/CD pipelines, and secure web application hosting.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7se.8xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz. It features 32 vCPUs, 32 physical cores, and 64.0 GB of RAM, establishing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The instance lacks bundled local storage and GPUs, but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Benchmark results indicate average multi-core performance with a Geekbench multi-core score of 13,470.0, alongside strong memory performance, highlighted by a Passmark memory score in the top 25%. Supported by AVX-512 and cryptography instruction sets, this instance is highly efficient for compute-bound workloads. It is best suited for software compilation, static web serving, batch processing, and moderate-scale LLM inference tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7se.8xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for compute-heavy workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 32-core Intel Xeon compute-optimized instance delivering strong memory performance and high-throughput processing for CPU-bound workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a dedicated 32-core Intel Xeon 8369B processor at 2.9 GHz
64.0 GB of system memory with strong memory benchmark performance
Features AVX-512, VAES, and SHA_NI hardware acceleration flags
Baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps with no local storage bundled
Best suited for software compilation, batch processing, and web serving
